businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des frais de financement VA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la tarifa de financiamiento VA.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify all property data with official documents.
Consult a mortgage broker for personalized rates.

description.short: Calculate VA loan funding fee added to the financed amount.
description.long: Calculate VA loan funding fee added to the financed amount.

short_i18n.en: Calculate VA loan funding fee added to the financed amount.
short_i18n.tr: Gaziler için peşinatsız kredinin faize eklenen fon maliyetini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die VA-Darlehensgebühr, die dem finanzierten Betrag hinzugefügt wird.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer les frais de financement du prêt VA ajoutés au montant financé.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la tarifa de financiamiento del préstamo VA añadida al monto financiado.
short_i18n.ar: حساب رسوم تمويل قرض VA المضافة إلى المبلغ الممول.
